title: Monday App for IoT

posts.author: jeromeskiply (Jerome Chambard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there ,
Skiply will soon release an App that will connect objects (smiley terminals and service request buttons) to Monday.com.
For instance, it can be used to automate cleaning request in a building or maintenance request in a facility.
I’ve never heard about IoT project connected to Monday.
Do you think it can be interesting?

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I see this being useful in our growth strategy.

posts.author: jeromeskiply (Jerome Chambard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
Here is the documentation of this first IoT App: Monday.com App - Field service requests and proof of presence - Skiply
Let me know if you want to test it!
